abilities.name: Psychic scream
abilities.desc:
You force a creature within range to make a Const saving throw. On a fail a target takes [2 x spell modifier + 10 + 1d10] psychic damage and rolls 1d6:
-1-3: the target falls prone
-4-5:the target is stunned for 1 turn
-6: the target fights by your side for 1 turn (charmed effect)

abilities.name: Ceaseless storm
abilities.desc: You mark a spot within range. At the end of each of your turns for the duration a lightning strikes the area. All creatures within 10 ft of the spot must succeed on a Dex saving throw or take [2 x spell modifier + 12 + 1d10] lightning damage. You can move the marked area, choosing a new spot, on any of your turns for the duration (costs 3 ap).

abilities.name: Nerve paralysis
abilities.desc: You force a creature within range to make a Const saving throw. On a fail, the creature is snared until the start of your next turn and takes [2 x spell modifier + 8 + 2d8] psychic damage.

abilities.name: Circle of confusion
abilities.desc: You create a circle centered on you (does move with you) with 15 ft radius. All enemy creatures that start their turn within the circle must succeed on a Wis saving throw or attack a creature at random - within range, if they are ranged; within 30 ft of them (by moving to them) if they are melee - for the rest of the turn (mages are able to cast aoes if they are targeted/centered on the target). The target is chosen by rolling a 1d(nr_of_targets). Possible targets include all creatures in range except for the attacker himself.
